overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a first-person walk along a wooden train station platform at night. The player moves past a horse-drawn carriage and along the facade of Riggs Station, with warm lamplight glowing from the windows against a dark, stormy sky. Rain begins to fall midway through as the camera rounds the corner of the building, revealing train tracks and the open rural landscape beyond.

events.description: passes the stationary horse-drawn carriage on the left side of the platform
approaches the main entrance of Riggs Station with sign becoming clearly visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden platform toward the station entrance, passing the carriage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked stationary on the platform edge

entered.detail: wooden carriage with large wheels parked on the platform
large wooden train station with horizontal siding and glowing windows
tall wooden water tower visible in the background against the dark sky
wooden sign reading RIGGS STATION above the entrance
wooden fence railing along the edge of the platform

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark night at a rural train station, with a horse-drawn carriage parked on the left and the wooden Riggs Station building ahead. The camera walks forward along the covered wooden platform, passing the carriage and approaching the warmly lit entrance. The building's facade features glowing windows and a prominent sign, with a water tower visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: station side platform with support pillars

events.description: rain begins to fall, creating a gentle downpour that continues for the remainder of the clip

agents.ego_description: continuing along the platform as it curves around the side of the building, moving under the covered walkway

entered.detail: stacked wooden crates and barrels against the building wall
thick wooden support pillars holding up the platform roof overhang

segments.scene_description: Moving along the side of the station, the camera passes wooden support pillars and stacked crates left near the wall. Rain begins to fall around the 35-second mark, visible against the warm glow of the interior lights shining through curtained windows. The platform remains covered as the building facade continues alongside, with the architecture showing detailed wooden siding and illuminated interiors.

scene_state.functional_zone: open platform with train tracks and rural landscape

events.description: NPC becomes visible through the station window, standing inside the lit interior

agents.ego_description: walking along the rear platform with train tracks visible to the right, observing the station interior through the windows

notable_agents.action: person standing inside the station visible through the lit window, appearing to wait or observe

entered.detail: metal train tracks running parallel to the platform into the distance
rolling grassy hills and pine trees visible in the dark background

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the open landscape beyond the station, with train tracks running alongside the platform and rain falling steadily against the dark sky. The camera moves past windows showing the station interior where an NPC is visible standing inside. The wooden platform extends toward the rural scenery with grassy hills and trees visible in the distance, while the water tower remains visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rural train station platform that transitions from a dry, sheltered night into a steady rainstorm. It begins by moving past a horse-drawn carriage toward the warmly lit entrance of Riggs Station, with a distant water tower silhouetted against the dark sky. As the camera continues along the side of the building, passing wooden support pillars and stacked crates, rain begins to fall, becoming visible against the golden glow of the curtained windows. The scene then opens up as the camera rounds the building to reveal the train tracks running parallel to the platform, catching a glimpse of an NPC standing inside the station. Finally, the view expands beyond the wooden architecture toward a dark, rainy landscape of grassy hills and distant trees.
